session_id: # session_id            = policy name. "default" is applied to all new connections automatically
# max_idle_sec          = seconds of no activity before session is flagged for cleanup
# reconnect_window_sec  = seconds a disconnected player has to reconnect and restore session
# max_packets_per_sec   = rate limit — packets above this are dropped (anti-flood)
# max_packet_size_bytes = any packet larger than this is rejected immediately
